predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The alien is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: has_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The alien has an illegal stay on the territory.

predicates.name: in_possession_of_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

predicates.name: in_possession_of_valid_passport
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

predicates.name: in_possession_of_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

predicates.name: national_authority_recognised_as_national
predicates.description: The national authority of the alien's country has recognised the alien as a national of that country.

predicates.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid documents or recognition by national authority.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe the alien will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the alien has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the alien is current and real.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(1) is met: the person did not submit a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make their international protection application within the time limit.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application during their illegal stay.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
predicates.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(2) is met: the person used false/misleading information, false/falsified documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(3) is met: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of alien regulations.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_alien_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate with the authorities responsible for enforcement of or supervision of compliance with alien regulations.

predicates.name: has_not_cooperated_with_alien_authorities
predicates.description: The person has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for enforcement of or supervision of compliance with alien regulations.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(4) is met: the person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(5) is met: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(6) is met: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating their stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(7) is met: the person concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(8) is met: the person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States and those applications gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(9) is met: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(10) is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

predicates.name: declared_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom
predicates.description: The person declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: file_shows_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom
predicates.description: It appears from the file of the person that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(11) is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: any_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.
